markets.question: Fortuna Sittard vs. PEC Zwolle: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Eredivisie game between Fortuna Sittard and PEC Zwolle, scheduled for May 10 at 10:45 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Fortuna Sittard and PEC Zwolle combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on eredivisie.nl. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Fortuna Sittard vs. PEC Zwolle - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Eredivisie game, scheduled for May 10 at 10:45 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Fortuna Sittard, entrenched in 12th place in the Eredivisie table with 36 points from 30 matches, welcomes 13th-placed PEC Zwolle (34 points) to Fortuna Sittard Stadion on May 10 for a pivotal mid-table clash amid the relegation scrap. PEC Zwolle's 1-0 clean-sheet win in their December reverse fixture underscores their head-to-head edge (11 victories to Fortuna's 5), though Fortuna's recent 1-1 home draw versus NAC Breda on April 12 signals grit despite patchy home form. Both squads face injury woes—Fortuna missing goalkeeper Mattijs Branderhorst, Daley Sinkgraven, and Justin Lonwijk; PEC without Jamiro Monteiro, Shola Shoretire, and Samir Lagsir—potentially tilting the matchup toward a low-scoring stalemate as traders weigh home advantage against Zwolle's defensive resilience.

markets.question: Ficovich vs. Ouden: Match O/U 23.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Juan Pablo Ficovich and Guy Den Ouden in the Francavilla, originally scheduled for May 4, 2026 at 4:00AM ET.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 24. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Challenger statistics.
markets.groupItemTitle: Francavilla: Juan Pablo Ficovich vs Guy Den Ouden Match O/U 23.5

events.title: Francavilla: Juan Pablo Ficovich vs Guy Den Ouden
events.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Juan Pablo Ficovich and Guy Den Ouden in the Francavilla, originally scheduled for May 4, 2026 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Juan Pablo Ficovich' if Juan Pablo Ficovich advances against Guy Den Ouden.

This market will resolve to 'Guy Den Ouden' if Guy Den Ouden advances against Juan Pablo Ficovich.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the first-round clash at the Francavilla Challenger on clay, slightly higher-ranked Guy Den Ouden (No. 193) faces Juan Pablo Ficovich (No. 207) in their debut head-to-head matchup. Ficovich boasts extensive clay experience with a 353-247 career record and a solid 3-4 mark on the surface in 2026, including a recent second-round exit in Mexico City Challenger. Den Ouden, meanwhile, struggles at 0-5 on clay this year amid a 2-10 overall slate, though his career clay ledger stands at 114-52. No injuries or withdrawals reported; outdoor conditions could amplify endurance tests for the Argentine grinder versus the Dutchman's baseline game. Traders weigh Ficovich's surface affinity against Den Ouden's ranking edge in this evenly poised opener.

markets.question: Game 2: Both Teams Destroy Barracks?
markets.description:
This market is about whether both teams destroy at least one enemy barracks during Game 2. In Dota 2, each team has six barracks (a melee and ranged barracks in each of the three lanes), located behind the Tier 3 towers.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Nemiga Gaming and MOUZ each destroy at least one enemy barracks (melee or ranged) during Game 2. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) do not destroy any enemy barracks.

If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 2 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Game 2 begins but is not completed and ends via forfeit, this market will resolve based on whether both teams destroyed at least one barracks prior to stoppage. If the condition was not met, this market will resolve to "No".

If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: Dota 2: Nemiga Gaming vs MOUZ (BO3) - 1win Essence Group A
events.description:

This market will resolve to "Nemiga Gaming" if Nemiga Gaming win the match against MOUZ.

This market will resolve to "MOUZ" if MOUZ win the match against Nemiga Gaming.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: In the 1win Essence I Group A round-robin, Nemiga Gaming sits at 0-2 after 0-2 losses to 1w Team and PlayTime, scoring zero maps amid draft struggles on patch 7.41b, while MOUZ enters at 0-1 following a 1-2 defeat to Yellow Submarine. A win is critical for both in this top-four-advance format, with Nemiga's 56% three-month winrate contrasting MOUZ's 43% but buoyed by world #10 ranking and stand-ins SumaiL (mid) and Tobi (support) adding TI experience to Crystallis, BOOM, and yamich. Head-to-head favors Nemiga 3-2, though MOUZ's recent map competitiveness suggests a tight BO3 series hinging on meta heroes like Nemiga's high-winrate Terrorblade and laning edges.

eventMetadata.context_description: KT Rolster enters the Esports World Cup 2026 Korea Qualifier playoffs BO3 against BNK FearX as the historical favorite, boasting a dominant 9-2 head-to-head series record including a clean 2-0 LCK win over FearX on April 24. Veteran stars like midlaner Bdd, jungler Cuzz, and ADC Aiming anchor KT's experienced roster (PerfecT, Cuzz, Bdd, Aiming, Effort), fueling trader consensus on their edge despite recent LCK stumbles—a 0-2 loss to Hanwha Life Esports and another to HANJIN BRION in Week 5. FearX counters with momentum from a LCK Cup runner-up finish and a fresh 2-0 over DN SOOPers, led by aggressive bot duo Taeyoon and Kellin (Clear, Raptor, VicLa, Taeyoon, Kellin) exploiting KT's skid in a high-stakes upper bracket clash where upsets loom in the current meta.

markets.description:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both KT Rolster and BNK FEARX each slay Baron Nashor at least once during Game 1. This market will resolve to "No" if either team (or both teams) does not slay Baron Nashor during Game 1.

If Game 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Game 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

markets.question: Will Bitcoin reach $1,000,000 by December 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will immediately resolve to "Yes" if any Binance 1 minute candle for Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) between November 24, 2025, 14:00 and December 31, 2026, 23:59 in the ET timezone has a final "High" price equal to or greater than the price specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "High" prices available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT, with the chart settings on "1m" for one-minute candles selected on the top bar.

Please note that the outcome of this market depends solely on the price data from the Binance BTC/USDT trading pair. Prices from other exchanges, different trading pairs, or spot markets will not be considered for the resolution of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices Valerio Aboian at 50% implied probability for their ATP Challenger Santos round-of-32 clash on clay, capturing the competitive balance between the No. 452-ranked Argentine and No. 424 Brazilian Pedro Sakamoto, who holds a 1-0 head-to-head edge from a grueling three-set win (6-7, 7-6, 6-4) last June in Santa Cruz. Both arrive off recent clay-court losses—Sakamoto 1-2 to Juan Bautista Torres on April 15 and Aboian 0-2 to Hugo Dellien on April 17—amid middling 2026 records of 17-13 and 7-10, respectively. Sakamoto's home-crowd boost in Santos could tip scales, while Aboian's endurance in long rallies poses upset threat; no injury concerns reported, but weather or late scratches remain variables.

markets.question: Will "Bully - Ye" be the Billboard 200 #1 album for the week of May 9?
markets.description:
Billboard updates the Billboard 200 albums chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data from the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then dated “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”.

This market will resolve according to the number 1 album on the Billboard 200 chart dated “Week of May 9, 2026”.

This market will resolve as soon as the relevant chart is published. If the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week is not published within 14 calendar days of the expected release date, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be the Billboard 200 chart for the specified week, published on the Billboard website (https://www.billboard.com/charts/billboard-200/) or through other official Billboard channels.

eventMetadata.context_description: Imperial Academy edged Infinite 2-1 in their United21 Season 47 playoffs upper bracket quarterfinal BO3 on April 9, prevailing on Ancient (9-7) and overtime Nuke (19-17) after dropping Mirage (13-16), en route to a shared 5th-6th finish while Infinite exited early at 7th-8th. Both advanced by topping double-elimination group stages—Imperial undefeated 2-0 in Group A, Infinite 2-1 in Group D—building on Imperial's prior 2-0 group stage sweep of Infinite in Exort Series #24 on March 29. Infinite's March roster overhaul with Dytor, kreaz, sl3nd, and later Blytz fueled a post-playoffs 9-match win streak and #65 HLTV ranking, contrasting Imperial's stable lineup and #224 spot, with their May 3 2-1 win over AaB signaling steady low-tier form amid no recent patch shifts.

The Third Circuit's April 6 ruling affirming exclusive federal jurisdiction over Kalshi's sports binaries bolstered confidence by curbing state challenges, while MLB's MOU with CFTC signals league cooperation. markets.question: Will UK GDP growth in Q1 2026 be between 1.5% and 1.8%?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the UK real gross domestic product (GDP) growth rate (% change) for Q1 of 2026 compared with the same quarter a year ago in the "GDP First quarterly estimate, UK" release for Q1 of 2026, scheduled for May 14, 2026.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The GDP release will be made available here: https://www.ons.gov.uk/economy/grossdomesticproductgdp/bulletins/gdpfirstquarterlyestimateuk/previousreleases

If no data for the specified quarter is released by the date the next quarter's data is scheduled to be released, this market will resolve based on data from the last available quarter.

Note: data from the initial release of the referenced GDP report is what will be used to resolve this market. Data may be revised during the following quarter or as a part of the next estimate's publication, however any revisions to GDP report data made after the initial release will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Palantir total customers above 1020 in Q1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Palantir’s total customer count (typically labeled "customer count") for the first fiscal quarter of 2026, as reported in its official company earnings materials, is above the listed amount. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The specified metric will be considered as reported in the company’s official earnings materials. Subsequent revisions will not be considered.

If the specified company’s official earnings materials for the specified quarter are released and the specified metric is not included, this market will resolve to “No”. 

If the specified company does not release quarterly earnings materials for the specified quarter by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “No”.

If the specified metric is reported as a range rather than a specific number, the midpoint of the range will be used for resolution of this market. 

The resolution source for this market is Palantir’s official company earnings materials, including press releases, investor presentations, and regulatory filings. If the specified metric is not reported in these materials, recordings or transcripts of the company’s earnings webcast may also be used.

Note: This market will resolve based on the most numerically precise version of the specified metric reported in the company’s official earnings materials. Only the specified metric will be considered; alternate versions that differ in definition or scope from the specified metric will not be considered.

markets.question: Will Donald Trump visit China on May 22, 2026?

The primary resolution source for this information will be official information from government of the United States of America, official information from Trump or released by his verified social media accounts (e.g. https://twitter.com/POTUS), however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

markets.question: Will J.D. Vance have a diplomatic meeting with Iran by May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a diplomatic meeting between the listed individual, acting as a representative of the United States, and representatives of Iran by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

To qualify, the listed individual must be physically present at the meeting and actively participate as a negotiator representing the United States.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not count.

The meeting must be in-person and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

President Trump voiced dissatisfaction on May 1 with Iran's revised proposal addressing nuclear enrichment and war cessation, capping multiple indirect and direct rounds since early April that yielded no breakthrough. Pakistan's army chief shuttled truce offers between Tehran and Washington last week, but sticking points endure amid Strait of Hormuz tensions. Resumed talks could occur soon under Trump's deadlines, potentially shifting diplomatic dynamics before the market resolves.

markets.question: NATO x Russia military clash by December 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a military encounter between the military forces of a NATO country and Russia between January 2, and December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A "military encounter" is defined as any incident involving the use of force such as missile strikes, artillery fire, exchange of gunfire, or other forms of direct military engagement between NATO and Russian military forces. Non-violent actions, such as airspace violations, firing of warning shots (such as the June, 2021 Black Sea Confrontations between Russian forces and HMS Defender), or cyberattacks will not qualify.

Interception of missiles or other one-way attack or loitering munitions (e.g. Shahed drones) which are targeting a 3rd party other than the listed countries or their respective forces will not alone qualify. Shooting down UAVs which are not munitions (e.g. MQ-9, Orlan 10, Orion, Bayraktar TB2, etc.) will qualify.

Intentional physical collisions, including aerial interceptions and naval ramming without the direct use of weaponry, such as the 2023 Black Sea incident—where a Russian Su-27 damaged a U.S. MQ-9 Reaper drone's propeller, leading to its crash— will not qualify regardless of damage.

Military contractors will qualify only if confirmed to be operating under the direct command or coordination of the respective state’s armed forces (e.g. the Battle of Khasham would not qualify).

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent airspace violations and intercepts have intensified NATO-Russia tensions without triggering direct military clash. NATO forces intercepted Russian strategic bombers and fighters over the Baltic Sea on April 20-21, while drone threats from the Ukraine conflict have spilled into Baltic states and Finland, prompting shoot-down orders for intruding aircraft. Dutch intelligence assesses a future confrontation risk as Russia tests alliance resolve amid the ongoing war, though deeming it unlikely short-term. US plans to cut 5,000 troops in Germany draw criticism for signaling weakness, as NATO Secretary-General Rutte addresses European readiness. Traders eye hybrid escalation, miscalculation risks, and NATO border exercises through June for potential shifts.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Istanbul be 14°C on May 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by NOAA at the Istanbul Airport in degrees Celsius on 5 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from NOAA, specifically the highest reading under the "Temp" column on the specified date once information is finalized for all hours on that date, available here: https://www.weather.gov/wrh/timeseries?site=LTFM

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the "Switch to Metric Units" button until the relevant table displays °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

AccuWeather and Weather Underground guidance, drawing from ECMWF and GFS ensembles, project a daytime high of about 60°F (15.6°C) with mostly cloudy skies and possible brief showers, following May 4's observed high near 13°C under NNW winds at 14 mph. This setup suppresses daytime heating via cloud cover and cool air advection, differentiating outcomes—greater clearing could push toward 16°C (21.5%), while thicker overcast favors 14°C. Historical early-May highs average 18-20°C, but current low-pressure patterns create this anomaly; watch final model runs today for shifts ahead of resolution.

markets.question: Will xAI have the best AI model at the end of June 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company which owns the model which has the highest arena rank based off the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on June 30, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" section on the Leaderboard tab of https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with the style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies first place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 280-299 tweets in May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X during the month of May 2026.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

The resolution source for this market is the 'Post Counter' figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if either of the following conditions are met by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

1) The listed individual is removed or resigns from their primary political post or from their position, if any, on the Chinese Politburo or its standing committee, with a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor.

2) The listed individual is expelled from the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). 

Qualifying announcements and reporting of a purge before this market's end date will immediately resolve this market to "Yes", regardless of when the announced resignation/removal/expulsion goes into effect.

A listed individual leaving office at the end of a regularly scheduled term, or being removed/resigning from office without a consensus of credible reporting describing the resignation/removal as a “purge”, “ousting”, or similar language, or to have presumably or definitively occurred as a result of corruption, bribery, other criminal wrongdoing, or a lack of political favor, will not qualify.

The resolution sources for this market will be information from the Chinese Government and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Xi Jinping's anti-corruption campaign has driven sweeping purges of senior People's Liberation Army (PLA) leaders throughout 2026, with the January investigations into top Central Military Commission (CMC) vice chairman Zhang Youxia—a longtime ally—and joint staff chief Liu Zhenli marking an unprecedented escalation into Xi's inner circle, reducing the CMC to its smallest size since 2022. February and March saw nine military lawmakers and three retired generals removed from the National People's Congress and Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference ahead of the Two Sessions, while April brought the ouster of a Politburo member, signaling continued efforts to enforce loyalty amid preparations for the 2027 Communist Party Congress. Traders weigh risks to remaining CMC members, defense officials, and potential civilian extensions, as no further high-profile actions have emerged in recent weeks.

markets.question: Will the official USD to ARS exchange rate be between 1450.00 and 1499.99 at the end of December 2026?
markets.description:
This is a market about Argentina’s official wholesale U.S. dollar exchange rate at market close on the last business day of December 2026, as published by the Central Bank of Argentina (BCRA).

This market will resolve according to the official wholesale USD to ARS exchange rate (Tipo de Cambio Mayorista, ($ por USD) Com. A 3500 | Referencia) at market close on the final business day of December 2026, as published by the BCRA on its official website (https://www.bcra.gob.ar/).

If the official rate for that date has not been published by the end of the 7th day after the end of the specified month, the market will resolve according to the most recently published official wholesale rate preceding that date.

The resolution source for this market will be the official BCRA publication. Resolution will occur once this figure is available.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the Central Bank of Argentina (BCRA), which reports the Wholesale Exchange Rate to two decimal points (e.g., 1,408.02 ARS per USD). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Polymarket traders' consensus, backed by real capital, prices a 39.5% implied probability for Argentina's official wholesale USD/ARS exchange rate exceeding 1600 by December 31, 2026, with 22.4% odds for 1500–1549.99, reflecting expectations of controlled peso depreciation amid President Milei's disinflation campaign, which slashed annual inflation to around 31.5% by end-2025 from triple digits. Current rate hovers near 1393 ARS/USD as of early May 2026, stabilized after a late-April spike to 1440 amid thin net reserves under $3 billion and external debt pressures. Recent Central Bank easing of FX controls in April supports reserve-building but highlights intervention reliance in the crawling peg regime, with mid-term elections and potential policy tweaks as key catalysts ahead.

markets.question: Spread: Tottenham Hotspur FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Premier League game, scheduled for May 11 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Tottenham Hotspur FC" if Tottenham Hotspur FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Leeds United FC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on premierleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.description: More markets for the Premier League game, scheduled for May 11 at 3:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: With the Premier League relegation battle intensifying—just six points separating Leeds United in 15th from third-bottom Tottenham Hotspur—traders eye this May 11 six-pointer at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium as pivotal for survival. Spurs' first league win of 2026 over Wolves provided momentum, but a crippling injury list deepened yesterday with Xavi Simons' ACL rupture joining season-ending absences for Dominic Solanke (hamstring) and others like Destiny Udogie, Pape Sarr, and Cristian Romero, testing squad depth at home. Leeds, holding a slight edge in the table, face Burnley beforehand amid milder concerns over Gabriel Gudmundsson (thigh) and Joe Rodon (ankle), while Tottenham dominate recent head-to-heads (six wins in last seven). Home advantage and desperation could sway the closely contested affair.

markets.question: Will Hong Kong have between 220-230mm of precipitation in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the total precipitation in mm in Hong Kong between May 1 and May 31, 2026, according to the Hong Kong Observatory.

The resolution source for this market will be the Hong Kong Observatory, specifically the "Total Rainfall (mm)" figure for all days in May 2026 under the "Daily Extract" at the https://www.weather.gov.hk/en/cis/climat.htm link once figures are finalized for the specified range.

If the reported data falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher bracket.

If the relevant data is not available by July 7, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, another credible resolution source will be chosen.

The resolution source for this market measures precipitation to 1 decimal place (e.g., 1.5), thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving this market. Any revisions to precipitation recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will Ron DeSantis join the Trump administration by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump officially nominates or appoints Ron DeSantis to his administration between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The Trump administration includes individuals formally appointed or nominated by Donald Trump to roles within the U.S. federal government, such as Cabinet members, Executive Office staff, senior policy advisors, ambassadors, or White House staff whose appointments are publicly announced by official government channels.

Nominations will qualify even if the individual is not confirmed.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the US government; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: Will Ron DeSantis join the Trump administration by June 30?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump officially nominates or appoints Ron DeSantis to his administration between market creation and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The Trump administration includes individuals formally appointed or nominated by Donald Trump to roles within the U.S. federal government, such as Cabinet members, Executive Office staff, senior policy advisors, ambassadors, or White House staff whose appointments are publicly announced by official government channels.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the US government; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, term-limited out of office in January 2027, faces slim odds of joining the Trump administration by June 30 amid unconfirmed rumors rather than official actions. Recent Axios reporting on April 21 cited sources claiming DeSantis is seeking high-profile roles like Attorney General, Secretary of Defense, or even a Supreme Court seat, prompting Trump to tell reporters on May 1 that he "likes him a lot" and would consider a cabinet spot. However, no nomination, resignation announcement, or formal discussions have materialized in the past week, with DeSantis remaining focused on state duties. Traders' strong 86% No consensus reflects the tight two-month window, historical patterns of early-term cabinet fillings, and absence of momentum for a mid-governorship exit.

eventMetadata.context_description: Burnley and Wolverhampton Wanderers are mathematically relegated to the Championship with 20 and 18 points respectively after dismal campaigns, leaving West Ham (36 points, 18th), Tottenham Hotspur (37 points, 17th), and Nottingham Forest (42 points, 16th) in a tense fight for the final Premier League survival spot with three matchweeks remaining. Tottenham's trader-favored resurgence under new manager Roberto De Zerbi—highlighted by back-to-back wins over Aston Villa (2-1) and Wolves (1-0)—has edged them above West Ham, who slumped following a 3-0 loss to Brentford. Forest boast the division's second-best recent form (unbeaten in six), but face a tricky trip to faltering Chelsea today amid Europa League final pursuits, while West Ham's daunting run-in includes Arsenal. Goal differences and head-to-head ties could prove decisive in this closely contested relegation scrap.

markets.question: Will Trump reduce the deficit before 2027?
markets.description:
The U.S. federal budget deficit for September 2025 was $197,949,630,362.16 (see: https://fiscaldata.treasury.gov/datasets/monthly-treasury-statement/summary-of-receipts-outlays-and-the-deficit-surplus-of-the-u-s-government). 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Monthly Treasury Statement (MTS) reports a lower monthly deficit in December 2026 than in September 2025. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

The resolution source will be the Monthly Treasury Statement (MTS) published by the U.S. Department of the Treasury (fiscaldata.treasury.gov). The month surplus can be found in the column labeled "Current Month Deficit Surplus Amount" in the the table "Summary of Receipts, Outlays, and Surplus or Deficit” in the MTS (see: https://fiscaldata.treasury.gov/datasets/monthly-treasury-statement/summary-of-receipts-outlays-and-the-deficit-surplus-of-the-u-s-government).  If no report is published by February 28, 2027, 11:59 PM ET another credible source will be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects an 84.5% implied probability for "No," driven by Congressional Budget Office projections showing the fiscal year 2026 federal deficit at $1.9 trillion (5.8% of GDP), with year-to-date figures already exceeding $1 trillion through February amid persistent revenue shortfalls and spending pressures. President Trump's policy mix—extension of 2017 tax cuts adding $1.4 trillion to decade-long deficits, alongside 42% defense spending hikes to $1.5 trillion in the April FY2027 budget proposal—offsets proposed non-defense discretionary cuts, per CBO analysis. Recent tariff policy shifts could further widen shortfalls by $1.1 trillion over ten years, reinforcing fiscal expansion. Key catalysts include final FY2026 Treasury data by September and debt ceiling negotiations.

Always Ready, Bolivian Primera División frontrunners in 2nd place with a potent early-season attack (4 goals scored, 0 conceded), absorbed a narrow 0-1 home loss to LDU Quito last week despite controlling possession. Lanús, Copa Sudamericana 2025 champions holding mid-table in Argentine Primera División (around 5th-8th), drew 0-0 at home versus Platense on April 1 amid midfield injuries to R. Loaiza (muscle) and doubts over W. Bou (knee) and D. Aquino (hamstring). The April 16 first leg in Buenos Aires looms large for group standings and momentum.

markets.question: Will Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) hit (LOW) $116 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.ABNB%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.ABNB%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Airbnb, Inc. (ABNB) hit in May 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Airbnb (ABNB) shares trade around $142, up 12% over the past month and near the 52-week high of $147, fueled by optimism ahead of the Q1 2026 earnings release on May 7. Q4 2025 results showed revenue growth accelerating to 12% year-over-year at $2.78 billion, beating estimates despite an EPS miss at $0.56, with full-year revenue reaching $12.2 billion on robust gross bookings and nights booked expansion. Analyst consensus rates the stock overweight with an average 12-month price target of $150, reflecting expectations for continued travel demand recovery and AI-driven innovations. Q1 guidance of $2.59–$2.63 billion revenue (14–16% growth) sets the bar; outperformance or upbeat Q2 outlook could propel shares higher by May's end, while softening occupancy or macro headwinds pose risks.

markets.question: Will Discord’s market cap be $30B or greater at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Discord's market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

If no IPO occurs by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO by June 30, 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency. It is calculated as the number of shares outstanding multiplied by the closing share price on the first trading day.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

Resolution will be based on the primary exchange’s official listing page. In the event that the relevant figure is not displayed, another reliable source will be used.

In the event of an interruption in the course of the normal trading session on Discord’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that as the first day of trading for purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices an 81.5% implied probability against a Discord IPO by June 30, 2026, driven by the absence of a public S-1 filing or roadshow following January reports of a confidential submission targeting a March debut, now derailed with just 57 days remaining. Secondary market valuations have compressed to $7–10 billion from a 2021 peak of $15 billion amid lagging monetization—estimated annual revenue of $600–800 million despite 200+ million monthly active users—exacerbated by a gaming-centric user base resistant to enterprise pricing. The <15B market cap outcome at 13.9% reflects this down-round dynamic if shares debut, while higher brackets languish below 3% absent revenue acceleration or M&A alternatives; no material updates in the past 30 days sustain the no-IPO lead.

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 460-479 tweets from May 1 to May 8, 2026?
markets.description:

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

Community reposts which are not counted by the tracker not count toward the total.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Qingdao be 26°C on May 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Qingdao Jiaodong International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 5 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Qingdao Jiaodong International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/qingdao/ZSQD.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a 33% implied probability for a 25°C high in Qingdao on May 5, reflecting China Meteorological Administration forecasts pointing to midday peaks around 25–26°C under partly cloudy skies with SSE winds of 15–25 km/h ushering warmer maritime air after recent severe convection. The spread across 24–28°C outcomes (totaling ~90%) stems from model disagreements—global ensembles like ECMWF lean cooler at 19–22°C due to lingering cloud cover and shower risks from yesterday's thunder-rains and gusts, while local CMA guidance holds firmer on above-normal temps amid May's climatological average of 21°C. Key variables include morning clearing, humidity (70–80%), and any residual frontal boundaries; CMA's next 12-hour update could sharpen resolution odds before official station measurements close the market.

markets.question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Spirit Academy vs Wave Esports (BO3) - Exort Series Main Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between Spirit Academy and Wave Esports in the Exort Series Main Stage, initially scheduled for April 16 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Spirit Academy" if Spirit Academy win the match against Wave Esports.

This market will resolve to "Wave Esports" if Wave Esports win the match against Spirit Academy.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Spirit Academy, Team Spirit's academy squad with a stable roster of VILBy, mazay, Kiryasoo, kidofpain, and s1nside since February 2026, faces Wave Esports in Exort Series #25 Main Stage Round 1 BO3, a 16-team Swiss bracket where top 8 advance to playoffs. Wave, fresh off a 3-1 Contenders Stage run, fields stand-ins cMS and pxsl due to absences, following March roster rebuilds adding Katalic, sheezy, and Belof amid recent losses like three defeats at Urban Riga Open Season 3. No prior head-to-head; trader consensus reflects Spirit's pedigree and momentum against Wave's instability in this online European C-Tier event with $10,000 prize pool.

markets.question: S&P 500 (SPY) closes above $710 on May 4?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the Close price for S&P 500 (SPY) on May 4, 2026 is higher than the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No."

If the two specified prices are exactly equal, this market will resolve to "No".

Closing prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

If S&P 500 (SPY) does not trade at all during the regular session, the market will resolve 50-50.

For a standard full trading session, the closing price refers to the Pyth "Close" value of the 1-minute candle corresponding to the final minute of regular trading hours on the primary exchange.

If the specified day has no valid Pyth Close value for the 1-minute candle corresponding to the end of regular trading hours on the primary exchange, the market will use the last valid Pyth price achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange as the effective closing price. If no valid Pyth price exists for that trading day due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption, the official closing price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine the closing price for that day.

If the listed date is not a trading day under the applicable trading-hours schedule as listed on Pyth, this market will resolve 50-50.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed security during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth. The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market will be Pyth, specifically the "Close" values for the relevant 1-minute candle available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.SPY%2FUSD.

markets.question: Will the U.S. flu hospitalization rate per 100,000 in Week 17 be between 95 and 100?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the cumulative influenza-associated hospitalization rate per 100,000 population for the United States, as reported for the specified week.

If the recorded data falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher bracket.

The resolution source for this market will be CDC FluView / FluSurv-NET (see: https://www.cdc.gov/fluview/index.html). If the FluSurv-NET hospitalization rate for the specified week is not released by 11:59 PM ET on the tenth calendar day following the date of the prior FluView weekly report release, this market will resolve to the lowest bracket.

Note: Only the CDC FluSurv-NET cumulative hospitalization rate per 100,000 population for the specified week will qualify, regardless of estimates, projections, state-level reports, or other influenza surveillance metrics published by the CDC or other sources.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus overwhelmingly favors a cumulative influenza-associated hospitalization rate of 85–90 per 100,000 population for Week 17 (ending May 2, 2026), with 98% implied probability, anchored by the CDC's FluView Week 16 report showing 85.7—the third-highest cumulative rate in recent seasons but with minimal weekly increases as seasonal activity wanes nationally. FluSurv-NET data confirm declining laboratory-confirmed cases and low outpatient influenza-like illness levels, reflecting post-peak dynamics typical for late spring. Upcoming Week 17 FluView release could refine this, but realistic challenges include unexpected regional surges from lingering H1N1 or H3N2 strains or reporting revisions; conversely, faster decline might dip below 85. Prediction models like FluSight anticipate continued low admissions.

markets.question: Will Xi Jinping win the Nobel Peace Prize in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize, as announced by the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

If multiple listed individuals or entities jointly receive the prize, the market will resolve to a single winner. If Donald Trump, Volodymyr Zelenskyy,  Benjamin Netanyahu, Vladimir Putin, or Elon Musk are among the recipients, the market will resolve to the highest-ranked among them in that exact order of precedence. If none of those five are among the winners and the prize is awarded jointly to at least one listed individual and at least one listed organization, the market will resolve in favor of the individual. If no prioritized individuals are among the winners and all listed recipients are of the same type (all individuals or all organizations), the market will resolve to the person whose last name, or the entity’s name, comes first in alphabetical order as listed in this market.

If no official announcement regarding the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize has been made by March 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other."

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement from the Norwegian Nobel Committee.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment for the 2026 Nobel Peace Prize remains highly fragmented, with Yulia Navalnaya edging out frontrunners at 7.5% implied probability, matched closely by Donald Trump and Volodymyr Zelenskyy at 6.5% each, driven by the Norwegian Nobel Committee's April 30 revelation of 287 nominations—208 individuals and 79 organizations—sparking widespread speculation on global figures. Navalnaya's lead reflects her rising cultural symbol as heir to Alexei Navalny's anti-Putin resistance amid Russia's ongoing repression, while Trump's momentum ties to reported endorsements from leaders like those in Pakistan and Israel for diplomatic breakthroughs, and Zelenskyy's to Ukraine's defiant narrative against invasion. Low probabilities across the board highlight the committee's secretive voting and focus on human rights—like concerns for jailed prior winner Narges Mohammadi—with the October 9 announcement as the key catalyst for shifts.

markets.question: Dota 2: DOGSENT vs Team Nemesis (BO3) - European Pro League Group B
markets.description:
This market refers to the Dota 2 match between DOGSENT and Team Nemesis in the European Pro League Group B, initially scheduled for May 4 at 8:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "DOGSENT" if DOGSENT win the match against Team Nemesis.

This market will resolve to "Team Nemesis" if Team Nemesis win the match against DOGSENT.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Rep. Ayanna Pressley (D), a member of the progressive Squad with deep Boston roots, anchors trader consensus at 93% for Democratic Party victory in MA-07, reflecting the district's entrenched D+33 partisan lean from recent presidential cycles and her landslide past wins exceeding 80% amid urban, diverse voter blocs in Roxbury, Dorchester, and Fenway. No credible Republican challengers have emerged ahead of the September 1 primaries, with Pressley's December 2025 reelection announcement—forgoing a Senate bid—and April endorsements from College Democrats solidifying her position absent polling or disruptions. Upsets could arise from a late GOP heavyweight recruit, national midterm wave favoring Republicans, primary surprise, or unforeseen scandal, though structural barriers remain high through November 3 general election.

markets.question: Will Encore Medical’s market cap be between $50M and $55M at market close on IPO day?
markets.description:
This market will resolve based on Encore Medical’s market capitalization at the closing price on its first day of trading.

As of market creation, the IPO is scheduled to price on April 22 (ET). If no such IPO occurs by May 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "No IPO before June 2026".

Market capitalization expresses the monetary value of a company’s outstanding shares, stated in its pricing currency.

It is calculated as the total number of outstanding shares, multiplied by the official closing share price of the publicly traded class on the first trading day.

If necessary, to accurately capture the company’s total market capitalization, rather than a stock-class-specific market capitalization, the calculation will include all outstanding share classes and apply any stated conversion ratios to the publicly traded class. Where no conversion right exists, such shares will be counted at their stated outstanding amount without discount, unless official filings explicitly specify differently.

The number of outstanding shares will be determined from official company filings or disclosures (e.g., SEC filings). The closing share price on the first trading day will be determined from the primary exchange’s official listing page.

If the relevant value falls exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official company filings and the primary exchange’s official listing page. The market capitalization will be determined through appropriate calculation using the total outstanding shares and the closing price from the first day of trading.

In the event of an interruption in the normal trading session on the specified company’s first day of trading (e.g., a circuit breaker or half-day), the market will resolve according to the official closing price of the abbreviated session. If no such official closing price is published, the market will resolve according to the next trading day on which an official closing price is published, treating that day as the first day of trading for the purposes of this market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment on the Encore Medical (EMI) IPO closing market cap market prices "No IPO before June 2026" at a leading 39.5% implied probability, driven by prolonged SEC review delays following the March 3, 2026 S-1/A amendment, with no effectiveness, roadshow, or pricing announced despite initial April targets. The development-stage cardiac implant developer's modest $2.6 million 2025 revenue, $0.9 million net loss, dwindling $94,000 cash reserves, and $1.5 million debt maturing mid-2026 underscore liquidity strains and going-concern risks, tempering prospects for the proposed $15 million offering of 3 million shares at $5.00. Lower-cap outcomes (<45M at 21%) reflect anticipated subdued valuation amid early-stage PerFOrm trial enrollment (13 patients) and U.S. regulatory hurdles, with pricing catalysts eyed ahead of June resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Relegation-battling US Cremonese host mid-table SS Lazio at Stadio Giovanni Zini in a pivotal Serie A matchup, with the hosts' survival hopes hinging on ending a three-match winless streak after a 0-0 draw versus Torino on April 19. markets.question: Will S&P 500 (SPY) hit (HIGH) $735 Week of May 4 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of May 4 2026, any 1-minute candle for S&P 500 (SPY) has a final "High" price equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the S&P 500 (SPY) "High" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.SPY%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.SPY%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily high price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will S&P 500 (SPY) hit Week of May 4 2026?
events.description: What will S&P 500 (SPY) hit Week of May 4 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects a 73% implied probability for SPY hitting ↓ $720 during the week of May 4, 2026, signaling caution after the S&P 500's 5% April surge to all-time highs around 7,230, driven by robust Q1 earnings and AI momentum amid resilient U.S. economic data like March nonfarm payrolls adding 178,000 jobs. High valuations, elevated margin debt, and lingering oil price pressures have prompted profit-taking, with SPY closing Friday near $722. Key catalysts this week include Magnificent 7 earnings reports, factory orders data on Monday, and Fed speakers like John Williams, which could shift rate cut expectations and test the rally's sustainability.

markets.question: Will AS Roma vs. ACF Fiorentina end in a draw?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for May 4, 2026
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: AS Roma vs. ACF Fiorentina
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Serie A game, scheduled for Monday, May 4, 2026 between AS Roma and ACF Fiorentina.

eventMetadata.context_description: Roma's trader consensus at 62.5% reflects their strong home form at Stadio Olimpico and push for a top-four Serie A finish with 61 points from 34 matches, bolstered by the returns of Manu Koné and Zeki Çelik from injury ahead of this round 35 clash. Fiorentina, languishing mid-table on 37 points with a poor away record and no fit strikers—Moise Kean out for family reasons, Piccoli doubtful, and multiple defenders sidelined like Fortini and Lamptey—face steep odds at 14.5%, tilting the draw to 23.5% amid Roma's head-to-head dominance (23 wins in 41 meetings). Recent squad lists confirm Roma's attacking options like Dybala and Malen, amplifying their edge in this relegation-skirting matchup for the visitors.

markets.question: Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors FC vs. Gwangju FC: O/U 3.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming K-League game between Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors FC and Gwangju FC, scheduled for May 5 at 1:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors FC and Gwangju FC combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on kleague.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors FC vs. Gwangju FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the K-League game, scheduled for May 5 at 1:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Jeonbuk Hyundai Motors hold a commanding historical edge over Gwangju FC, winning 22 of 33 head-to-head matches, as traders assess their upcoming K League 1 clash on May 5 at Jeonju World Cup Stadium. Their Round 3 encounter on March 14 ended in a 0-0 stalemate, but Jeonbuk has since built momentum with recent victories over FC Anyang and Daejeon Citizen, positioning them around second or third in the early standings with solid defensive form. Gwangju languishes mid-table after a 3-0 defeat to Gangwon FC last weekend, exposing away vulnerabilities. No major injury news from official reports; home advantage and Jeonbuk's superior recent form drive trader consensus on a competitive but tilted matchup.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Hong Kong be 22°C on May 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded by the Hong Kong Observatory in degrees Celsius on 5 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from the Hong Kong Observatory, specifically the "Absolute Daily Max (deg. C)" the specified date once information is finalized in the relevant "Daily Extract", available here: https://www.weather.gov.hk/en/cis/climat.htm

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures in Celsius to one decimal place (eg, 9.1°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Hong Kong Observatory's latest 9-day forecast, updated at 16:30 HKT on May 4, projects a maximum temperature of 24°C on May 5 amid mainly cloudy skies, occasional showers, and isolated thunderstorms early, driven by a moderating northeast monsoon and upper-air disturbances limiting solar heating. High relative humidity (80-95%) and east winds (force 4-5) further suppress daytime warming, aligning trader consensus with 24°C leading at 38.5% over 25°C (32%). The close odds reflect forecast uncertainty in shower clearance timing and cloud breaks, which could allow slight warming via urban heat effects or reduced cloud cover later; historical May maxima average 28-29°C, but current cooler monsoon regime dominates. Watch HKO's evening update for refined model runs.

markets.question: OG Anunoby: Rebounds O/U 6.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for May 4 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if OG Anunoby records more than 6.5 total rebounds during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if OG Anunoby records 6.5 rebounds or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: 76ers vs. Knicks
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for May 4 at 8:00PM ET:
If the 76ers win, the market will resolve to "76ers".
If the Knicks win, the market will resolve to "Knicks".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

eventMetadata.context_description: The No. 3 New York Knicks host the No. 7 Philadelphia 76ers in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference semifinals at Madison Square Garden, with the Knicks holding home-court advantage after a first-round win over the Hawks. Philadelphia's Joel Embiid is probable with a right hip contusion, a critical factor given his dominance against New York's frontcourt of Karl-Anthony Towns and Mitchell Robinson, while Tyrese Maxey is available despite a finger splint. Knicks' Jeremy Sochan is probable (left hamstring), leaving both rosters largely intact. Key matchups include Jalen Brunson versus Maxey in the backcourt and Paul George against OG Anunoby, with recent playoff momentum and rest advantages shaping trader consensus on this rivalry renewal.

markets.question: Will Anthony Hudson win the 2026 Michigan Governor Republican primary election?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the Republican Primary for Governor of Michigan, scheduled to take place on August 4, 2026. Resolution will be based on the overall winner of the primary, including any potential second round or run-off.

If no 2026 Michigan Gubernatorial Republican Primary takes place, this market will resolve to “Other.”

The resolution source for this market will be the first official announcement of the results from the Michigan Republican Party; however, an overwhelming consensus of credible reporting may suffice.

events.title: Michigan Governor Republican Primary Winner
events.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices self-funded businessman Perry Johnson at 59.5% to win Michigan's Republican gubernatorial primary on August 4, reflecting his dominant ad spending—fueled by personal wealth—and momentum from his 2022 statewide run, positioning him ahead of U.S. Rep. John James (31%) despite a late-April Detroit Regional Chamber poll showing James leading 37-20% among likely voters. Key recent developments include Johnson's April 23 signature filing to secure ballot access, his exclusion as the presumed frontrunner from the May 1 Oakland County GOP debate featuring four rivals, and an April 22 lawsuit feud with James alleging improper attacks. The fragmented field leaves lower-polling candidates like Evan Space (9.7%) and Joyce Gipson (9.4%) as longshots; further endorsements or polls could tip this competitive open primary race to succeed term-limited Gov. Gretchen Whitmer.

markets.question: Will Capitão Wagner win the 2026 Ceará gubernatorial election?
markets.description:
The Ceará gubernatorial election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026, with a runoff on October 25, 2026, if no candidate receives a majority of the valid votes in the first round.

This market will resolve according to the candidate who wins this election.

Temporary, interim, or placeholder governors appointed by any means before the specified election will not be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., www.tse.jus.br/eleicoes/resultados-eleicoes).
